top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 103, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before August.
11,712ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
114ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion. Train it until it feels boring.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 103 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 11,712ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.
Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 103 miles.
At Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
103 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 103 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Tempo is Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 103 miles on mixed terrain. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion’s 103 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Vélomediane Claudy Criquielion. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and VO2max to prepare you for 103 miles of mixed terrain in La Roche-en-Ardenne, Belgium.
